CustomField.formula: IF(RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Order', Order_S__r.Barcode__c, if( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Work_Order', Work_Order__r.Barcode__c, IF( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Purchase_Order', Purchase_Order__r.Barcode__c, IF( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Transfer_Order', Transfer_Order__r.Barcode__c, IF( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'RMA', RMA__r.Barcode__c, Logistic_Barcode__c )))))
CustomField.label: Barcode
